leads.title: We Need a Freelance Web Developer | Ongoing Builds ...
leads.snippet:
We Need a Freelance Web Developer | Ongoing Builds ...

Facebook · Find Web Developer ( Bangladesh )
10+ comments · 1 day ago
leads.full_content:
We Need a Freelance Web Developer | Ongoing Builds, Consistent Work
We're a UK-based agency that sells websites to tradesmen and contractors. Landscapers, painters, electricians, plumbers, builders. We have a live sales pipeline, active clients, and a cold outreach operation bringing in new deals every week. We need a freelance web designer to handle our builds on an ongoing basis.
The work:
Clean, professional 5-page websites for UK tradesmen. Nothing overly complex. You'll build one strong template per trade niche and then reuse it, swapping colours, images, and copy for each new client. When we enter a new niche, you'll spend a bit longer creating the initial template, but after that it's rinse and repeat. We want someone who takes ownership of their workload and finds ways to be as efficient as possible.
We moved away from aesthetics clinics because they need pixel-perfect custom work. Tradesmen need sites that look good, load fast, and get them enquiries. That's the standard.
Plat

leads.title: מחפש Solo Developer (פרילנס/ית) ל-Vibe Coding. פיתוח ...
leads.snippet:
מחפש Solo Developer (פרילנס/ית) ל-Vibe Coding. פיתוח ...

Facebook · דרושים מתכנתים ואנשי פיתוח
20+ comments · 1 month ago
leads.full_content:
מחפש Solo Developer (פרילנס/ית) ל-Vibe Coding.
פיתוח מערכות מבוססות AI בקצב גבוה, עבודה ישירה וצמודה מול היזמים, משלב הרעיון דרך MVP ועד מערכות שעובדות אצל לקוחות ומייעלות את החברה עסקית וכלכלית.
התפקיד כולל פיתוח Full-Stack, עבודה עם DB ושרתים (Supabase / AWS / S3),
שימוש ב-AI-Assisted Development, Cursor, ואינטגרציות APIs ו-Webhooks.
לא מחפשים מושלם.
כן מחפשים מישהו/י עם חתירה למגע כערך עליון, יכולת למידה עצמית ופתרון בעיות במהירות ויעילות, אחריות, ויכולת לגדול יחד עם מוצר ועם חברה.
מתאים למי שרוצה להיכנס לעולמות SaaS, להשפיע באמת, ולעבוד בסביבה לא היררכית עם אופק התפתחות שלא קיים בחברות הגדולות.
אם בנית מערכות מקצה לקצה ויודע/ת להמשיך לקדם דברים גם כשהכול כבר רץ ויש משתמשים במערכת,
שלח/י בפרטי כמה מילים על עצמך ודוגמה לפרויקט / תהליך טכנולוגי שניהלת מקצה לקצה.

leads.title: Looking for a Freelance Web Designer ...
leads.snippet:
Looking for a Freelance Web Designer ...

Facebook · Framer Website Designers | Framer Developers | Framer CMS
90+ comments · 11 months ago
leads.full_content:
Looking for a Freelance Web Designer & Developer (Framer)
I'm looking for a talented and reliable freelancer to collaborate with me on building modern, responsive websites. The ideal partner is someone who’s skilled in design and development – so I can focus fully on copywriting, SEO, client communication, and sales.
What you'll be working on:
1. Designing and developing responsive websites
2. Working primarily in Framer
3. Creating clean layouts, smooth animations, and user-friendly interfaces
4. Implementing functional forms for lead generation and contact
5. Regular light maintenance of existing websites
Bonus if you have experience with:
1. WordPress, Webflow, Shopify
2. Integrating AI tools (like chatbots, automations, etc.)
About the collaboration:
All clients are Swedish companies. I handle all the communication, strategy, and SEO – you focus on design and implementation. Most clients speak English, but you won’t have to communicate with them directly. 
Compensation:
The payment

leads.title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer (NestJS, Prisma, Next.js ...
leads.snippet:
Freelance Full-Stack Developer (NestJS, Prisma, Next.js ...

Facebook · Le bon développeur 🇹🇳 المبرمج المناسب
20+ comments · 6 months ago
leads.full_content:
Freelance Full-Stack Developer (NestJS, Prisma, Next.js, C++)
We're looking for a freelancer to continue working on an ongoing project, modernizing a legacy system and building a new web app. Key responsibilities:
- Continue development of NestJS backend with Prisma
- Enhance Next.js frontend with React Query
- Focus on cloud infrastructure setup (hosting, backups, security, scalability)
- Set up CI/CD pipelines with Docker and GitHub Actions
- Collaborate on data migration from legacy C++ system
*Tech Stack:*
- Backend: NestJS, Prisma
- Frontend: Next.js, React Query
- Database: SQL/Postgres (Prisma ORM)
- Cloud: Hosting, backups, security, and scalability

leads.title: Hiring full-stack freelancer for AI startup
leads.snippet:
Hiring full-stack freelancer for AI startup

Facebook · Sydney Startups
2 comments · 3 months ago
leads.full_content:
Looking for a Full-Stack Freelancer to Help Build My AI Startup
Hey everyone! I’m building JARVIX — a cross-platform AI desktop assistant (Electron + React + AI APIs) designed to be an always-on-top AI companion with multimodal chat, voice input, premium features, and deep productivity integrations.
We already have a strong working prototype, and now I’m looking for a skilled freelancer to help push it to production quality.
 Tech Stack We Use
 • Electron + Node.js (desktop app)
 • React + TypeScript (auth + UI)
 • Supabase (auth + DB)
 • Stripe (subscription payments)
 • OpenAI + Gemini APIs
 • Azure Speech-to-Text
 • PDF processing
 • Electron Builder (Mac/Windows/Linux builds)
 What You’ll Work On
(Directly from gaps in the current codebase)
 UI/UX polish across multiple Electron windows
 Responsive layout improvements for chat & settings pages
 Stripe subscription flow + webhook testing
 Production payment workflows (Checkout, Billing Portal, premium access gating)
 React component

leads.title: Fullstack developer with node.js experience needed
leads.snippet:
Fullstack developer with node.js experience needed

Facebook · מתכנתות ומתכנתים ג'וניורים
6 comments · 3 weeks ago
leads.full_content:
אומנם לא ג׳וניורי אבל אני יודע שיש כאן גם כאלו.
מחפש מפתח fullstack מנוסה בדגש על הקלייט, עבודה מתגמלת מאוד.
We’re looking for a strong frontend developer (5+ years) - fullstack bonus - with hands-on experience across Node.js, Next.js, and TypeScript building production systems end-to-end. Must be experienced with PostgreSQL (schema design and performance) and AWS, including serverless architectures (Lambda, API Gateway, S3, IAM, CloudWatch). You should be comfortable owning frontend, backend, and cloud deployment, integrating external APIs, and shipping production code independently. Strong experience working with AI tools, LLM APIs, and AI-assisted development workflows is required.

leads.title: Hiring freelance website developer for project
leads.snippet:
Hiring freelance website developer for project

Facebook · Remote BD Jobs
5 comments · 8 months ago
leads.full_content:
Hiring: Expert Freelance Website Developer (Project-Based)
We’re looking for a talented and experienced freelance website developer to work on a project-based assignment. If you specialize in building modern, responsive, and high-performing websites—and you’re available for freelance work—this is a great opportunity to collaborate on an exciting project!
 About the Project:
You will be responsible for designing and developing a fully functional, visually appealing, and user-friendly website based on our specifications. The project will require both front-end and back-end development, with potential integrations such as contact forms, booking systems, payment gateways, or admin dashboards.
 What We’re Looking For:
3+ years of professional web development experience.
Strong skills in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and responsive design.
Proven experience with WordPress, Shopify, or custom CMS platforms (depending on the project type).
Backend experience with PHP, Node.js, or Python is a plus.
